# FinaCloud — Technical Documentation

> Auto-generated by codebase analysis on 2026-04-05

---

## 1. Overview

FinaCloud is a multi-tenant, multi-module ERP and point-of-sale web platform built for Georgian-market SMBs and enterprises. It manages inventory, sales, purchasing, restaurant/café operations, hotel management, HR/payroll, loyalty programs, pharmacy workflows, and integrates with external food-delivery platforms (Glovo, Wolt, Bolt, Yandex). Each tenant company is provisioned its own SQL Server database, and the platform serves both a browser-based SPA-style management interface and a machine-facing REST API consumed by POS terminals, cashier devices, and third-party delivery services.

---

| Category | Technology | Version |

| Language | C# | .NET 8.0 |
| Frontend | AngularJS | 1.8.3 |
| Web Framework | ASP.NET Core (MVC + Web API) | 8.0 |
| ORM | Entity Framework Core | 8.0.3 |
| Raw SQL | ADO.NET via `SqlHelper` (custom) | — |
| Database | SQL Server (per-tenant DB) | — |
| Serialization | Newtonsoft.Json | via `Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc.NewtonsoftJson 8.0.3` |
| Authentication | JWT Bearer (external IdP) + Session cookie | `Microsoft.AspNetCore.Authentication.JwtBearer 8.0.3` |
| Excel I/O | EPPlus.Core | 1.5.4 |
| PDF generation | Select.HtmlToPdf.NetCore | 23.2.0 |
| Image processing | SixLabors.ImageSharp | 3.1.5 |
| API documentation | Swashbuckle.AspNetCore + Annotations | 6.7.1 |
| PWA | WebEssentials.AspNetCore.PWA | 1.0.85 |
| UI framework | Bootstrap CSS only | 3.3.7 |
| UI widgets | jqWidgets Framework | 19.0.0 |
| Build tooling (JS) | Gulp | 4.0.2 |
| Containerization | Docker (Windows Nano Server 1809) | — |
| Host | IIS with AspNetCoreModuleV2 (in-process) | — |
| Source control / CI | Azure DevOps / TFS | http://devops-server:8080/finacollection |
| Testing | xUnit | 2.4.2 |
| Code coverage | coverlet.collector | 3.2.0 |
| Caching | IMemoryCache + IDistributedMemoryCache | ASP.NET Core built-in |
| Localization | Custom JSON-based (`JsonStringLocalizer`) | — |
| Observability | `ILogger<T>` (ASP.NET Core built-in), `Logging` audit table in SQL | — |

## 3. Solution Structure

```
FinaCloud.sln
├── ExcelExport/                   Class library — Excel export/import using EPPlus.Core
│   ├── Export.cs                  Generates styled .xlsx byte arrays from column/row descriptors
│   ├── Import.cs                  Parses uploaded Excel files into model lists
│   └── Models/                    ExcelColumnViewModel, ExcelRowModel, ExportListModel, ImportModel
│
├── FinaCloud/                     Main ASP.NET Core 8.0 web application (MVC + REST API)
│   ├── Program.cs                 Composition root — DI registration, middleware pipeline, routing
│   ├── Dockerfile                 Multi-stage Windows Nano Server 1809 image
│   ├── web.config                 IIS AspNetCoreModuleV2 in-process hosting, shadow copy enabled
│   ├── Controllers/               57 ASP.NET controllers (MVC views + REST API)
│   ├── DatabaseHelper/
│   │   ├── DataContext.cs         EF Core DbContext — 200+ DbSet<T> covering all domain entities
│   │   ├── DataHelper.cs          General-purpose EF query methods for reference data
│   │   ├── SqlHelper.cs           ADO.NET helper — multi-tenant connection resolution, raw SQL
│   │   └── Models/                200+ EF entity classes (domain model)
│   ├── Repositories/              50+ repository interfaces + implementations (Repository pattern)
│   ├── Services/                  HTTP client wrappers for external services
│   │   ├── AccountHttpService.cs  Calls https://account.fina24.ge (auth, user management)
│   │   ├── NewsService.cs         Calls https://news.fina24.ge
│   │   ├── SubwayHttpService.cs   Subway (food chain) API client

│   │   └── TransporterService.cs  GPost + DHL parcel registration clients
│   ├── Utils/
│   │   ├── BusinesHelper.cs       Central business-logic facade (IBusinesHelperService)
│   │   ├── FuncHelper.cs          Cross-cutting helpers (menus, Excel via OfficeOpenXml, cache)
│   │   ├── LoggingHelper.cs       Reflection-driven field-level audit-log builder
│   │   ├── CryptoSecurity.cs      AES-256-CBC encrypt/decrypt (passwords, connection tokens)
│   │   ├── StaticHelper.cs        Static utility methods (PDF, email, image, enum helpers)
│   │   ├── SwaggerControllersConvention.cs  Hides all controllers from Swagger except OneCApi
│   │   └── Enums.cs               DocTypes enum (50+ document types)
│   ├── Filters/
│   │   ├── ValidateUserSession.cs         Session auth check; redirects or returns 401
│   │   ├── CashierValidationFilter.cs     Header-based auth for POS/cashier terminals
│   │   ├── PublicServiceRequestFilter.cs  AES-encrypted query-param auth for public endpoints
│   │   ├── SwaggerApiKeyFilter.cs         Adds api_key header param to all Swagger operations
│   │   ├── ModelLogAttribute.cs           Marks properties for audit logging
│   │   └── ModelLogValueAttribute.cs      Provides display name resolution for logged values
│   ├── Localization/
│   │   ├── LocalizationMiddleware.cs      Sets culture from query/session (default: ka-GE)
│   │   ├── JsonStringLocalizer.cs         IStringLocalizer backed by JSON language files + IDistributedCache
│   │   └── JsonStringLocalizerFactory.cs  Factory for the above
│   ├── InternalModels/            Request/response models for APIs (not EF entities)
│   ├── ViewModels/                View-facing models used by both MVC views and API responses
│   ├── Views/                     Razor (cshtml) files: Default, Main, Report, PublicService, etc.
│   ├── Languages/                 Lang.ka-GE.json, Lang.en-US.json, Lang.ru-RU.json
│   ├── App_Data/                  Menu JSON files, report SQL
│   ├── ExcelTemplate/             Excel file templates
│   └── wwwroot/                   Static files: AngularJS controllers, services, CSS, images
│
└── FinaCloud.Tests/               xUnit test project (skeleton — no test files authored yet)
```

## 4. Architecture

### 4.1 Architectural Style

**N-Tier Layered Monolith** with a multi-tenant data isolation model.

The application is a single deployable unit (one ASP.NET Core process) that exposes both a server-rendered MVC web interface and a REST API. It is organised into four classical tiers: Presentation → Business Logic → Data Access → Database. Multi-tenancy is achieved at the data tier: each tenant (company) has its own SQL Server database; the tenant's connection string is resolved at runtime from `appsettings.json` using a key stored in the authenticated user's session (`SessionModel.Domain`) or in a JWT claim (`client_connection`). There is no per-tenant code isolation — all tenants share the same process.

### 4.2 Layer / Slice Breakdown

| Layer | Folder / Class | Responsibility |
|---|---|---|
| **Presentation** | `Controllers/` | HTTP request handling, input binding, response serialisation. ~57 controllers. |
| **Presentation** | `Views/` | Razor templates for browser-rendered pages (login, main SPA shell, reports). |
| **Presentation** | `Filters/` | Cross-cutting auth/validation concerns applied via `[ServiceFilter]`. |
| **Business Logic** | `Utils/BusinesHelper.cs` | Core business rules: document numbering, costing, VAT, inventory recalculation, external integrations (Subway, Account). |
| **Business Logic** | `Utils/FuncHelper.cs` | Permission resolution, menu building, memory-cached reference reads. |
| **Business Logic** | `Utils/LoggingHelper.cs` | Audit-trail construction via reflection on `[ModelLog]`-annotated properties. |
| **Data Access** | `Repositories/` | 50+ repository classes. Each implements a domain-specific interface and encapsulates all DB queries for that area. |
| **Data Access** | `DatabaseHelper/DataContext.cs` | EF Core `DbContext` with ~200 `DbSet<T>` properties. |
| **Data Access** | `DatabaseHelper/SqlHelper.cs` | ADO.NET raw-SQL helper. Resolves per-tenant connection on every call from session or `HttpContext.Items["connection"]`. |
| **Data Access** | `DatabaseHelper/DataHelper.cs` | EF-based CRUD for shared reference data (units, currencies, contragents, etc.). |
| **Infrastructure** | `Services/` | Named `HttpClient` wrappers for external HTTP services. |
| **Infrastructure** | `Localization/` | Distributed-cache-backed JSON localisation middleware and `IStringLocalizer`. |
| **Infrastructure** | `ExcelExport/` | Standalone class library for Excel I/O. |

### 4.3 Communication Patterns

#### Synchronous (REST/HTTP)

| Direction | Mechanism | Details |
|---|---|---|
| Browser → FinaCloud | HTTP REST (JSON) | AngularJS `$http` calls to `/api/**` routes. Session cookie auth (`ValidateUserSession` filter). |
| FinaCloud → account.fina24.ge | `AccountHttpService` (named `HttpClient`) | User authentication, password change, SQL provisioning scripts, delivery company lookup. |
| FinaCloud → news.fina24.ge | `NewsService` (`HttpClient`) | In-app news feed. Singleton service, 5-second timeout. |
| FinaCloud → Subway API | `SubwayHttpService` | Subway brand product/order integration. |
| FinaCloud → eMenu API | `EmenuHttpService` | eMenu restaurant platform sync. |
| FinaCloud → GPost API | `GPostService` | Georgian Post parcel registration (Basic auth). |
| FinaCloud → DHL API | `DhlPostService` | DHL parcel registration. |
| FinaCloud → delivery-gateway.fina24.ge | Inline `HttpClient` in delivery controllers | Forwards normalised delivery order result after saving locally. |
| Glovo → `/api/glovo/receive_order` | Webhook (POST) — `GlovoController` | Receives Glovo orders; looks up tenant by store ID; saves to tenant DB; forwards to gateway. |
| Wolt → `/api/wolt/get_orders` | Webhook (POST) — `WoltController` | Same pattern as Glovo. |
| Bolt → `/api/bolt/receive_order` | Webhook (POST) — `BoltController` | Same pattern. |
| Yandex → `/api/yandex/**` | Webhook (POST) + OAuth token endpoint | Same pattern, JWT-protected. |
| Online Order platform → `/api/onlineorder/**` | REST (JWT Bearer) — `OnlineOrderController` | Menu serving + order receipt; JWT carries `client_connection` claim. |
| POS terminals → `/api/cashier/**` | REST — `CashierApiController` | Custom header auth (`Validation: fina_cashier` + `ck` AES-encrypted connection string). |

#### No Asynchronous Messaging

There is no message broker, event bus, or background worker (no RabbitMQ, Azure Service Bus, MassTransit, SignalR, or `IHostedService` in the codebase).

### 4.4 Data Storage & Access

#### Database

- **SQL Server** — one database per tenant. Database names follow the pattern `ipm{NN}_{rand}_{rand}` (auto-generated by `DatabaseRepository.CreateDatabase`).
- A single **master** database holds shared configuration/connection metadata; tenant connection strings are stored in `appsettings.json` under `Data:DefaultConnection:<key>`.
- The `DatabaseController` / `DatabaseRepository` provide admin endpoints to provision, translate, back up, and delete tenant databases by executing SQL scripts fetched from `account.fina24.ge`.

#### ORM — Entity Framework Core 8.0

- `DataContext` (`FinaCloud/DatabaseHelper/DataContext.cs`) contains ~200+ `DbSet<T>` properties.
- Sensitive data logging is enabled in development (`options.EnableSensitiveDataLogging(true)` in `Program.cs`).
- **No EF migrations folder found** — schema management appears to be handled via SQL scripts obtained from the account service.
- Queries use `AsNoTracking()` for read-only paths.

#### Raw SQL — SqlHelper

- `SqlHelper` (`FinaCloud/DatabaseHelper/SqlHelper.cs`) provides methods: `DynamicQuery`, `ExecuteSql`, `GetString`, etc., all backed by `Microsoft.Data.SqlClient`.
- Command timeout set to 720 seconds for `DynamicQuery`, 360 seconds for `ExecuteSql`.
- Connection resolution: reads `SessionModel.Domain` from session, or falls back to `HttpContext.Items["connection"]` for filter-injected paths.

#### Caching

- **In-memory**: `IMemoryCache` — used in `FuncHelper` for static language dictionary (10-hour TTL).
- **Distributed memory cache**: `IDistributedCache` — used by `JsonStringLocalizer` to cache per-culture localisation strings. Currently backed by `AddDistributedMemoryCache()` (in-process; not Redis).

---

## 5. Design Patterns

| Pattern | Where Implemented | Why |
|---|---|---|
| **Repository** | `Repositories/*.cs` — e.g., `ProductOutRepository : IProductOutRepository` | Isolates all data access for a business domain behind an interface; allows the controller/service to depend on an abstraction. |
| **Dependency Injection / IoC** | `Program.cs` — ~50 `AddScoped<IFoo, Foo>()` registrations | All repositories, services, helpers, and filters are resolved from the container. |
| **Singleton** | `SqlHelper` (registered `AddSingleton`), `NewsService` | `SqlHelper` is thread-safe (static field with per-request resolution); `NewsService` shares a single `HttpClient`. |
| **Action Filter** | `ValidateUserSession` (`Filters/ValidateUserSession.cs`) | Applied as `[ServiceFilter(typeof(ValidateUserSession))]`; redirects or 401s unauthenticated requests. |
| **Authorization Filter** | `CashierValidationFilter`, `PublicServiceRequestFilter` (`Filters/`) | Custom header/query-param auth for POS terminals and public QR-code endpoints. |
| **Middleware Pipeline** | `LocalizationMiddleware` (`Localization/LocalizationMiddleware.cs`) | Thread-culture injection; registered via `app.UseMiddleware<LocalizationMiddleware>()`. |
| **Options Pattern** | `builder.Services.Configure<FormOptions>`, `Configure<GzipCompressionProviderOptions>` in `Program.cs` | Strongly-typed configuration for upload limits and compression levels. |
| **Facade** | `BusinesHelper : IBusinesHelperService` (`Utils/BusinesHelper.cs`) | Single entry point for >50 cross-cutting business-logic methods used by multiple repositories and controllers. |
| **Strategy** | `SqlHelper.setConnectionString()` + `CashierValidationFilter` / `PublicServiceRequestFilter` | Runtime selection of tenant connection string from session vs. HTTP context items. |
| **Named HttpClient Factory** | `builder.Services.AddHttpClient<AccountHttpService>("Account24")` etc. in `Program.cs` | Each external service gets a typed + named client with preconfigured base address and timeout. |
| **Decorator (custom)** — Audit Logging | `ModelLogAttribute` / `ModelLogValueAttribute` + `LoggingHelper.BooksLogging(...)` | Attributes mark entity properties; `LoggingHelper` uses reflection to diff current vs. DB object and build a `Logging` record. |
| **Composite** | `NavigationMenuModel` tree structure read from `App_Data/menu*.json` | Hierarchical menu items consumed by `FuncHelper.GetMainMenu()`. |
| **IOperationFilter (Swagger Decorator)** | `SwaggerApiKeyFilter` (`Filters/SwaggerApiKeyFilter.cs`) | Injects `api_key` header parameter into every Swagger operation. |
| **IActionModelConvention** | `SwaggerControllersConvention` (`Utils/SwaggerControllersConvention.cs`) | Sets `ApiExplorer.IsVisible = false` on all controllers except `OneCApi`, suppressing them from Swagger output. |
| **Sealed Singleton (manual)** | `CryptoSecurity` (`Utils/CryptoSecurity.cs`) — instantiated with `new CryptoSecurity()` | AES-256-CBC utility; `sealed` class; no state after construction. |
| **Template Method** | `BaseListRepository.InitValues()` + per-tag SQL table config | Shared repository initialisation backed by a `Table` configuration entity read from the database. |

---

## 6. API Surface

### Browser / SPA (Session-authenticated — `ValidateUserSession`)

All routes below require a valid `FinaUser` session cookie. Called by the AngularJS frontend.

| Route prefix | Controller | Domain |
|---|---|---|
| `api/advanced` | `AdvancedApiController` | Operations log, batch operations, documents, waybills |
| `api/billing` | `BillingController` | License provisioning (add/delete/deactivate) |
| `api/cashier` | `CashierApiController` | POS terminal book data, sales, close-day operations |
| `api/construction` | `ConstructionApiController` | Construction project documents |
| `api/customerinventarization` | `CustomerInventarizationApiController` | Customer-side inventory |
| `api/customerorder` | `CustomerOrderApiController` | Sales orders |
| `api/customerreturn` | `CustomerReturnApiController` | Customer return documents |
| `api/dashboard` | `DashboardApiController` | KPI metrics, sales analytics |
| `api/documentapi` | `DocumentApiController` | Generic document list/save/delete |
| `api/hotel` | `HotelApiController` | Room reservations, group bookings, minibar, cleaning, seasons |
| `api/loyalty` | `LoyaltyApiController` | Customer loyalty programs, points, groups |
| `api/maintenance` | `MaintenanceApiController` | Asset maintenance workflows |
| `api/operation` | `OperationApiController` | Financial operations (bank, cash) |
| `api/pharmacy` | `PharmacyController` | Pharmacy API auth, product matching, transactions |
| `api/productcancel` | `ProductCancelApiController` | Product cancel documents |
| `api/productin` | `ProductInApiController` | Purchase/goods receipt documents |
| `api/productinexprense` | `ProductInExpenseApiController` | Purchase expense documents |
| `api/production` | `ProductionApiController` | Production orders and bills |
| `api/productmove` | `ProductMoveApiController` | Inter-store stock transfers |
| `api/productout` | `ProductOutApiController` | Sales/dispatch documents |
| `api/productoutdoc` | `ProductOutDocApiController` | Dispatch docs with Zedazeni/waybill |
| `api/productoutsingle` | `ProductOutSingleApiController` | Quick single-product sales |
| `api/productprocess` | `ProductProcessApiController` | Product processing/transformation |
| `api/productstart` | `ProductStartApiController` | Opening stock documents |
| `api/productvirtualmove` | `ProductVirtualMoveApiController` | Virtual (non-physical) stock moves |
| `api/remainder` | `RemainderApiController` | Stock remainder adjustments |
| `api/report` | `ReportController` (MVC) | Report rendering (table, chart, print) |
| `api/restaurant` | `RestaurantApiController` | Café orders, tables, rooms, production, actions |
| `api/retailmarket` | `RetailMarketApiController` | Retail market flows |
| `api/rs` | `RsApiController` | GRS (Georgian Revenue Service) integration |
| `api/schedule` | `StaffAmountScheduleApiController` | Staff scheduling |
| `api/search` | `SearchApiController` | Global entity search |
| `api/servicein` | `ServiceInApiController` | Service purchase documents |
| `api/smos` | `SmosApiController` | SMOS/Elco/eMenu delivery platform sync |
| `api/storeorder` | `StoreOrderApiController` | Store requisition orders |
| `api/transporter` | `TransporterApiController` | Parcel registration (GPost, DHL, cities lookup) |
| `api/vendororder` | `VendorOrderApiController` | Vendor purchase orders |
| `api/vendorreturn` | `VendorReturnApiController` | Vendor return documents |
| `api/vendorreturnorder` | `VendorReturnOrderApiController` | Vendor return order flows |
| `api/distributiominventarization` | `DistributionInventarizationApiContoller` | Distribution inventory |
| `api/cardcodeout` | `CardCodeOutApiController` | Card/loyalty code dispatch |
| `api/inventarization` | `InventarizationApiContoller` | Physical stock count |
| `api/additionalcolumn` | `AdditionalColumnController` | Custom columns on documents |
| `api/customreport` | `CustomReportApiController` | User-defined custom reports |

### POS / Cashier Terminal (`CashierValidationFilter` — header-based)

| Route | Controller | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| `api/cashier/**` | `CashierApiController` | Shares controller with session-auth paths; filter selects mode by header presence |
| `api/onec/**` | `OneCApiController` | 1C accounting integration stub |

### Delivery Webhooks (No session required)

| Route | Controller | Caller |
|---|---|---|
| `POST api/glovo/receive_order` | `GlovoController` | Glovo webhook; validated by a static bearer token constant |
| `POST api/wolt/get_orders` | `WoltController` | Wolt webhook (order notification format) |
| `POST api/bolt/receive_order` | `BoltController` | Bolt Food webhook |
| `POST api/yandex/**` | `YandexController` | Yandex Eda — JWT-protected + OAuth token proxy |
| `POST api/onlineorder/**` | `OnlineOrderController` | Generic online ordering — JWT Bearer (`[Authorize]`) |

### Public Service (AES-encrypted `ck` query parameter)

| Route | Action | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| `GET /PublicService/LoyaltyCardAddFromQr` | `PublicServiceController` | QR-code-triggered loyalty card registration (multi-step form) |

### Internal Admin / Utility

| Route | Controller | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| `/Database/**` | `DatabaseController` | Create/delete/backup tenant databases; no auth attribute (intended for internal admin access only) |
| `/System/ExecuteQuery` | `SystemController` | Raw SQL execution (PIN-protected: hardcoded `"1020"`) |
| `/AccountUtils/get_ipms` | `AccountUtilsController` | Returns IP + DB size per tenant connection for monitoring |
| `GET /Default/Index` | `DefaultController` | Login page (cached 50 min) |
| `GET /Default/FsRed` | `DefaultController` | Federated SSO redirect with encrypted token |

### Swagger

Only `OneCApiController` is exposed in the Swagger UI at `/swagger`. All other controllers are hidden via `SwaggerControllersConvention`.

---

## 7. Configuration & Secrets Management

### Configuration Loading

ASP.NET Core's default `WebApplication.CreateBuilder(args)` loads configuration in the standard order:
1. `appsettings.json`
2. `appsettings.{Environment}.json`
3. Environment variables
4. Command-line arguments

No Kubernetes ConfigMaps, Azure Key Vault, or `.env` files were found.

### Key Configuration Sections

| Section | Usage |
|---|---|
| `Data:DefaultConnection:<tenantKey>` | Per-tenant SQL Server connection string. Keys are short company identifiers (e.g., `"ipm01_1234_56"`). Resolved at runtime in `SqlHelper.setConnectionString()` and explicit repository paths. The `DatabaseRepository` reads and writes this section directly to disk (`appsettings.json`) when provisioning new tenants. |
| JWT Bearer | Authority: `https://account.fina24.ge`; Audience: `fina24api`; Token type: `at+jwt`. Configured in `Program.cs`. |
| Session | Cookie name: `.fina24.Session`; idle timeout: 12 hours; `IsEssential = true`. |
| Form upload limits | `ValueLengthLimit = int.MaxValue`, `MultipartBodyLengthLimit = long.MaxValue` (unrestricted). |

### Secrets Handling

- **Database connection strings**: Stored in plaintext in `appsettings.json` on disk. No secret manager or vault integration found.
- **Cashier connection tokens**: The POS terminal sends an AES-256-CBC-encrypted connection key in the `ck` HTTP header. `CryptoSecurity.DecryptCashierConnection()` decrypts using a hardcoded passphrase (`iPointFINA#2010Passphrase`).
- **Public service tokens**: AES-256-CBC-encrypted, passed as a URL query parameter `ck`. Same key material.
- **User passwords**: AES-256-CBC encrypted and stored in `FinaUser.WebPassword`; also synced to the external account service.
- **GPost credentials**: Hardcoded placeholder strings (`MY_USERNAME`, `My_PASSWORD`) in `TransporterService.cs` — implementation incomplete.
- **Glovo token**: Hardcoded constant `GLOVO_TOKEN` in `GlovoController.cs`.

> ⚠️ **Security note**: Multiple secrets (AES passphrase, API tokens) are hardcoded in source. Production deployments should externalize these to a secrets vault.

---

## 8. Deployment & Infrastructure

### Docker

Defined in `FinaCloud/Dockerfile` using a **multi-stage Windows Nano Server 1809** build:

```
Stage 1 (base):   mcr.microsoft.com/dotnet/aspnet:8.0-nanoserver-1809 — exposes port 8080
Stage 2 (build):  mcr.microsoft.com/dotnet/sdk:8.0-nanoserver-1809 — restores & builds
Stage 3 (publish): dotnet publish -c Release to /app/publish
Stage 4 (final):  copies publish output; ENTRYPOINT ["dotnet", "FinaCloud.dll"]
```

Both `FinaCloud` and `ExcelExport` projects are copied and restored together.

### IIS Hosting

`web.config` configures:
- **AspNetCoreModuleV2** in-process hosting.
- **Shadow copy** enabled (`enableShadowCopy = true`, directory `../ShadowCopyDirectory/`) allowing hot deployment without process restart.

### Source Control / CI-CD

- **Version control system**: Azure DevOps (TFS) — `SccTeamFoundationServer = http://devops-server:8080/finacollection` (from `FinaCloud.sln`).
- No pipeline YAML files (`.github/workflows`, `azure-pipelines.yml`, `Jenkinsfile`) were found in the workspace — pipeline definition is stored server-side in Azure DevOps.
- **Build configurations**: `Debug` (full debug symbols) and `Release` (no symbols, optimised).

### Infrastructure as Code

No Terraform, Bicep, Helm, Pulumi, or ARM templates found. Infrastructure is managed manually.

### Environments

Only a single `appsettings.json` was referenced in code — no `appsettings.Development.json` or `appsettings.Production.json` files observed. However, the ASP.NET Core convention supports them if present at runtime. The `DatabaseController` contains a hardcoded path `C:\FINA IIS\FINA Web Sites\FINA24__POS_APIBackend\appsettings.json`, indicating a local-Windows production deployment convention.

---

## 9. Testing Strategy

### Test Project: `FinaCloud.Tests`

| Item | Detail |
|---|---|
| Framework | xUnit 2.4.2 |
| Test runner | `xunit.runner.visualstudio` 2.4.5 |
| Code coverage | `coverlet.collector` 3.2.0 |
| SDK | `Microsoft.NET.Test.Sdk` 17.5.0 |

The test project contains only the `.csproj` file — **no test classes or test files** are present at the time of analysis. The testing infrastructure is configured but no tests have been authored.

There is no mocking library (`Moq`, `NSubstitute`), no integration test setup, and no test containers configuration in the solution.

## 10. Key Dependencies

| Package | Version | Role in this project |
|---|---|---|
| `Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.SqlServer` | 8.0.3 | ORM for all model-driven CRUD operations; `DataContext` with 200+ entity sets. |
| `Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc.NewtonsoftJson` | 8.0.3 | JSON serialisation (replaces System.Text.Json); configured to ignore reference loops and preserve unspecified DateTime zones. |
| `Microsoft.AspNetCore.Authentication.JwtBearer` | 8.0.3 | JWT Bearer auth for machine-to-machine API consumers (delivery platforms, online ordering). Authority: `account.fina24.ge`. |
| `Swashbuckle.AspNetCore` + `.Annotations` | 6.7.1 | OpenAPI/Swagger auto-documentation. Only `OneCApi` controller exposed; all others hidden via convention. |
| `WebEssentials.AspNetCore.PWA` | 1.0.85 | Adds Progressive Web App support (service worker, web manifest, NetworkFirst strategy) for offline-capable browser UX. |
| `SixLabors.ImageSharp` | 3.1.5 | Image resizing and processing (product images, monitor images). |
| `Select.HtmlToPdf.NetCore` | 23.2.0 | Converts Razor-rendered HTML to PDF for printable documents (invoices, waybills, etc.). |
| `EPPlus.Core` | 1.5.4 | Excel file generation and parsing in the `ExcelExport` library. |
| `Microsoft.Data.SqlClient` | (transitive) | ADO.NET SQL Server driver used directly in `SqlHelper` and several repositories for raw SQL execution. |
| `Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc.Razor.RuntimeCompilation` | 8.0.3 | Razor view hot-reload in Debug builds only (conditional `Condition="'$(Configuration)' == 'Debug'"`). |
| `OfficeOpenXml` | (via EPPlus.Core) | Underlying Excel engine used also directly in `FuncHelper` for some export paths. |
| `Newtonsoft.Json` / `Newtonsoft.Json.Linq` | (transitive via MVC) | Used pervasively for `JObject`, `JArray`, `JToken` in controllers and repositories for ad-hoc JSON manipulation. |
| `xunit` | 2.4.2 | Test framework (infrastructure in place, no tests authored). |
| `coverlet.collector` | 3.2.0 | Code coverage data collector for CI pipelines. |
| `AngularJS` (npm) | 1.8.3 | Frontend SPA framework; all browser UI pages are driven by AngularJS controllers and services served from `wwwroot`. |
| `jqWidgets Framework` (npm) | 19.0.0 | Data grids, charts, and tree widgets used throughout the management UI. |

---

## 11. Notable Implementation Details

### 1. Runtime Multi-Tenancy via `appsettings.json`
Each HTTP request resolves a tenant-specific SQL Server database at runtime. `SqlHelper.setConnectionString()` reads the connection string from `IConfiguration` under `Data:DefaultConnection:<domain>`, where `<domain>` comes from the user's session (`SessionModel.Domain`) or is injected into `HttpContext.Items["connection"]` by an authorization filter. The `DatabaseRepository` also writes new connection string entries directly to `appsettings.json` on disk when provisioning tenant databases. This couples deployment configuration to the running process.

### 2. Dual Data Access Strategy (EF Core + ADO.NET)
The codebase uses EF Core (`DataContext`) and raw ADO.NET (`SqlHelper`) side-by-side within the same repository classes. EF Core handles CRUD on strongly-typed entities; `SqlHelper.DynamicQuery()` handles complex analytical queries and stored procedure calls, returning `List<IDictionary<string, object>>` (dynamic dictionaries). This is common in brownfield ERPs where report queries are too complex for LINQ.

### 3. Reflection-Driven Audit Logging
`ModelLogAttribute` and `ModelLogValueAttribute` decorate entity properties. `LoggingHelper.BooksLogging(current, database_object)` uses reflection to compare old versus new values and builds a `Logging` + `List<LoggingItem>` record, which is persisted alongside every document save via `_db.Loggings.Add(log)`. This provides field-level audit trails without any framework dependency.

### 4. `SwaggerControllersConvention` — Intentional Swagger Suppression
`SwaggerControllersConvention` (`Utils/SwaggerControllersConvention.cs`) sets `action.ApiExplorer.IsVisible = false` on every controller except `OneCApiController`. This is intentional — the API surface is treated as internal, and only the 1C accounting integration endpoint is officially documented. Delivery webhook controllers (Glovo, Wolt, etc.) are also hidden.

### 5. AES-256-CBC Hardcoded Key Material
`CryptoSecurity` uses a hardcoded passphrase, salt, and IV baked into the class itself. The same key material is used for encrypting cashier terminal connection strings in POS headers and for public-facing QR-code tokens. Compromise of the source code exposes all encrypted tokens.

### 6. Food Delivery Webhook Aggregator Pattern
`GlovoController`, `WoltController`, `BoltController`, `YandexController`, and `OnlineOrderController` all follow the same flow:
1. Receive webhook POST from delivery platform.
2. Call `AccountHttpService.GetDeliveryCompanyConnection(storeId, ...)` to resolve the tenant key.
3. Build tenant connection string from `IConfiguration`.
4. Save `DeliveryLog` + platform-specific order to tenant DB via `IDeliveryApiRepository`.
5. `POST` to `https://delivery-gateway.fina24.ge/delivery/receive_order` with normalised result.
6. Return HTTP 200 to delivery platform.

### 7. Custom JSON Localisation with Distributed Cache
`JsonStringLocalizer` reads language strings from `Languages/Lang.{culture}.json` files and caches individual key lookups in `IDistributedCache` (key format: `locale_{culture}_{key}`). `LocalizationMiddleware` sets `Thread.CurrentThread.CurrentCulture` per request based on query string → session → default `ka-GE`. Supported cultures: Georgian (`ka-GE`), English (`en-US`), Russian (`ru-RU`).

### 8. Version-Gated Business Logic
`SessionModel.Versions` (an integer) controls which business-logic path or UI variant a company sees. References appear throughout `BaseListRepository.InitValues()` and controller actions (e.g., `user.Versions == 1 ? "VIEW_PRODUCTS_REST" : "VIEW_PRODUCT_REST_BASIC"`). This is the mechanism for delivering different product "tiers" (Basic, Standard, Advanced) to different customers from a single codebase. The `menu_basic.json`, `menu_standart.json`, and `menu_advanced.json` files in `App_Data/` correspond to these tiers.

### 9. Empty Test Project
`FinaCloud.Tests` has the xUnit + coverlet infrastructure configured but contains zero test classes. New developers should treat the entire domain logic as untested from an automated-test perspective.

### 10. `SystemController.ExecuteQuery` — PIN-Gated Raw SQL Execution
`SystemController.ExecuteQuery` accepts arbitrary SQL from the request body and executes it against the tenant database. The only protection is a hardcoded PIN check (`model.Pin != "1020"`). This endpoint should be restricted to trusted networks or removed in production.

---

*End of documentation.*
